requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Household Refrigerators (TCVN 7828)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——家用电冰箱（TCVN 7828）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——家用電冰箱（TCVN 7828）

summary.en: Vietnam operates a mandatory Minimum Energy Performance Standard (MEPS) regime for household refrigerating appliances under the Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), implementing the Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy (Law No. 50/2010/QH12) and Decision No. 04/2017/QD-TTg (and successor roadmap decisions) which lists refrigerators among products subject to mandatory minimum energy efficiency. The technical basis is TCVN 7828 (energy efficiency requirements for household refrigerating appliances), with energy consumption measured per TCVN 7829. A refrigerator that does not meet the minimum energy efficiency level set in TCVN 7828 may not be imported or sold in Vietnam. The MEPS level and the star-rating energy efficiency classification are determined from tested annual energy consumption against the standard volume and climate-class basis defined in TCVN 7828. Energy testing must be performed by a MOIT-recognised testing laboratory and the results form the basis for the energy label.
summary.zh: 越南对家用制冷器具实施由工贸部（MOIT）主管的强制性最低能效标准（MEPS）制度，依据《节约与高效用能法》（第50/2010/QH12号法）及总理第04/2017/QD-TTg号决定（及后续路线图决定），电冰箱被列为须符合强制最低能效的产品。技术依据为TCVN 7828（家用制冷器具能效要求），耗电量按TCVN 7829测量。不符合TCVN 7828规定最低能效水平的电冰箱不得进口或在越南销售。MEPS水平及星级能效分级，依据按TCVN 7828规定的标准容积及气候等级基准检测所得的年耗电量确定。能效检测须由MOIT认可的检测实验室进行，检测结果构成能效标识的依据。
summary.zht: 越南對家用製冷器具實施由工貿部（MOIT）主管的強制性最低能效標準（MEPS）制度，依據《節約與高效用能法》（第50/2010/QH12號法）及總理第04/2017/QD-TTg號決定（及後續路線圖決定），電冰箱被列為須符合強制最低能效的產品。技術依據為TCVN 7828（家用製冷器具能效要求），耗電量按TCVN 7829測量。不符合TCVN 7828規定最低能效水平的電冰箱不得進口或在越南銷售。MEPS水平及星級能效分級，依據按TCVN 7828規定的標準容積及氣候等級基準檢測所得的年耗電量確定。能效檢測須由MOIT認可的檢測實驗室進行，檢測結果構成能效標識的依據。

standards_or_laws: TCVN 7828 — Household refrigerating appliances — Energy efficiency requirements (technical basis for MEPS and energy classification)
Law No. 50/2010/QH12 — Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy
Decision No. 04/2017/QD-TTg — List of products and equipment subject to minimum energy efficiency and roadmap for application (MOIT/Prime Minister)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits, enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label system administered by the NDRC. Products must display the China Energy Label before sale. GB 12021.2 uses a different test methodology and grade basis than TCVN 7828/7829 — a Chinese energy grade does not map directly to the Vietnamese MEPS threshold or star rating without recalculation against the Vietnamese reference basis.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值，由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展改革委（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识。GB 12021.2使用的试验方法及等级基准与TCVN 7828/7829不同——中国能效等级未经按越南参考基准重新计算，不能直接对应越南MEPS门槛或星级评定。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值，由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展改革委（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識。GB 12021.2使用的試驗方法及等級基準與TCVN 7828/7829不同——中國能效等級未經按越南參考基準重新計算，不能直接對應越南MEPS門檻或星級評定。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Three gaps: (1) Different test and threshold basis — TCVN 7828/7829 set the Vietnamese MEPS and star rating; a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating under GB 12021.2 does NOT guarantee the unit clears the Vietnamese MEPS floor, and annual energy consumption must be re-evaluated against the Vietnamese reference. (2) Local testing — energy data must come from a MOIT-recognised laboratory in Vietnam or one whose results MOIT accepts; Chinese GB test reports are generally not accepted as-is. (3) MEPS is a hard import gate — a model below the TCVN 7828 minimum cannot be imported or sold, regardless of its China Energy Label grade. Exporters should plan energy re-testing and confirm the current MEPS floor before shipment.
gap.zh: 三项差距：（1）检测与门槛基准不同——TCVN 7828/7829确定越南MEPS及星级评定；GB 12021.2下的中国1级或2级评定不等同于通过越南MEPS底线，年耗电量须按越南参考重新评估。（2）本地检测——能效数据须来自MOIT认可的越南实验室或其结果被MOIT接受的实验室；中国GB检测报告一般不被直接接受。（3）MEPS为强制进口门槛——低于TCVN 7828最低水平的产品不得进口或销售，与其中国能效标识等级无关。出口商应规划能效重新检测，并在出货前确认当前MEPS底线。
gap.zht: 三項差距：（1）檢測與門檻基準不同——TCVN 7828/7829確定越南MEPS及星級評定；GB 12021.2下的中國1級或2級評定不等同於通過越南MEPS底線，年耗電量須按越南參考重新評估。（2）本地檢測——能效數據須來自MOIT認可的越南實驗室或其結果被MOIT接受的實驗室；中國GB檢測報告一般不被直接接受。（3）MEPS為強制進口門檻——低於TCVN 7828最低水平的產品不得進口或銷售，與其中國能效標識等級無關。出口商應規劃能效重新檢測，並在出貨前確認當前MEPS底線。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — refrigerators must meet the TCVN 7828 minimum energy performance level (MEPS) to be imported or sold in Vietnam; enforced by MOIT under Law 50/2010/QH12 and Decision 04/2017/QD-TTg
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade of Vietnam (MOIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Meeting Vietnam's MEPS under TCVN 7828/7829 is a legal precondition for importing or selling household refrigerators. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not substitute for the Vietnamese MEPS threshold — annual energy consumption should be re-tested at a MOIT-recognised laboratory and assessed against the current TCVN 7828 floor before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合越南TCVN 7828/7829下的MEPS是进口或销售家用电冰箱的法定前提。中国GB 12021.2等级不能替代越南MEPS门槛——年耗电量应在MOIT认可实验室重新检测，并在出货前对照当前TCVN 7828底线评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合越南TCVN 7828/7829下的MEPS是進口或銷售家用電冰箱的法定前提。中國GB 12021.2等級不能替代越南MEPS門檻——年耗電量應在MOIT認可實驗室重新檢測，並在出貨前對照當前TCVN 7828底線評估。

requirement_topic.en: Mandatory Energy Labelling — Vietnam Energy Efficiency Label (MOIT)
requirement_topic.zh: 强制能效标识——越南能效标签（MOIT）
requirement_topic.zht: 強制能效標識——越南能效標籤（MOIT）

summary.en: Under the Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy (Law No. 50/2010/QH12) and MOIT implementing circulars (notably Circular No. 36/2016/TT-BCT on energy labelling and its successors), household refrigerators must carry the Vietnam Energy Efficiency Label before being sold. There are two label types: the comparative label (star rating, typically 1 to 5 stars, derived from energy efficiency measured per TCVN 7828/7829) and the confirmation label where applicable. The supplier or importer must register the energy label with MOIT, submit a test report from a recognised laboratory, and obtain MOIT acknowledgement before affixing the label and placing the product on the market. The label shows the star rating, annual electricity consumption (kWh/year), model identification, and a registration reference. Online and in-store listings must reflect the registered efficiency information.
summary.zh: 根据《节约与高效用能法》（第50/2010/QH12号法）及工贸部实施通函（特别是关于能效标识的第36/2016/TT-BCT号通函及其后续文件），家用电冰箱在销售前须附贴越南能效标签。标签分两类：比较型标签（星级评定，通常1至5星，依据按TCVN 7828/7829测得的能效）及适用情况下的确认型标签。供应商或进口商须向MOIT注册能效标签、提交认可实验室出具的检测报告，并在贴标及投放市场前取得MOIT确认。标签标注星级、年耗电量（千瓦时/年）、型号标识及注册编号。在线及门店商品列表须反映已注册的能效信息。
summary.zht: 根據《節約與高效用能法》（第50/2010/QH12號法）及工貿部實施通函（特別是關於能效標識的第36/2016/TT-BCT號通函及其後續文件），家用電冰箱在銷售前須附貼越南能效標籤。標籤分兩類：比較型標籤（星級評定，通常1至5星，依據按TCVN 7828/7829測得的能效）及適用情況下的確認型標籤。供應商或進口商須向MOIT登記能效標籤、提交認可實驗室出具的檢測報告，並在貼標及投放市場前取得MOIT確認。標籤標注星級、年耗電量（千瓦時/年）、型號標識及登記編號。線上及門店商品列表須反映已登記的能效資訊。

standards_or_laws: Circular No. 36/2016/TT-BCT (MOIT) — Regulations on energy labelling for energy-using means and equipment (and successor circulars)
Law No. 50/2010/QH12 — Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy
TCVN 7828 / TCVN 7829 — energy efficiency requirements and test method underpinning the refrigerator energy label

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision). The label shows a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest) and annual energy consumption and is administered by CNIS under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on testing against GB 12021.2. The Chinese self-declared grade label is structurally different from the Vietnamese MOIT star-rating label and the MOIT registration-and-acknowledgement workflow, and is not interchangeable with it.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL）体系，依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版）。标识展示1至5级评级（1级最高效）及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明等级。中国自我声明的等级标识与越南MOIT星级标签及MOIT注册—确认流程在结构上不同，二者不可互换。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL）體系，依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版）。標識展示1至5級評級（1級最高效）及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明等級。中國自我聲明的等級標識與越南MOIT星級標籤及MOIT登記—確認流程在結構上不同，二者不可互換。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions with no direct Chinese equivalent: (1) MOIT energy-label registration — the importer or supplier must file a test report from a recognised laboratory and register the energy label with MOIT, then obtain acknowledgement before the label is used and the product sold; this is a workflow the Chinese self-declared CEL does not satisfy. (2) Vietnamese star-rating label — the physical comparative label (1 to 5 stars, kWh/year, model, registration reference) must appear on the product and in listings; the Chinese 1-to-5 grade CEL cannot serve as the Vietnamese label and must be replaced. MOIT and market surveillance check that products on sale carry a valid registered label, so a missing or unregistered label blocks lawful sale.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求在中国无直接对应：（1）MOIT能效标签注册——进口商或供应商须提交认可实验室检测报告并向MOIT注册能效标签，于使用标签及销售产品前取得确认；此流程为中国自我声明的CEL所不能满足。（2）越南星级标签——实体比较型标签（1至5星、千瓦时/年、型号、注册编号）须出现在产品及商品列表上；中国1至5级CEL不能充当越南标签，须予替换。MOIT及市场监管会核查在售产品是否附有有效已注册标签，故缺失或未注册标签将阻碍合法销售。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求在中國無直接對應：（1）MOIT能效標籤登記——進口商或供應商須提交認可實驗室檢測報告並向MOIT登記能效標籤，於使用標籤及銷售產品前取得確認；此流程為中國自我聲明的CEL所不能滿足。（2）越南星級標籤——實體比較型標籤（1至5星、千瓦時/年、型號、登記編號）須出現在產品及商品列表上；中國1至5級CEL不能充當越南標籤，須予替換。MOIT及市場監管會核查在售產品是否附有有效已登記標籤，故缺失或未登記標籤將阻礙合法銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MOIT energy-label registration and display of the Vietnam Energy Efficiency Label are legally required before sale; based on Law 50/2010/QH12 and MOIT Circular 36/2016/TT-BCT (and successors), with efficiency per TCVN 7828/7829
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade of Vietnam (MOIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MOIT energy-label registration and display of the Vietnam Energy Efficiency Label are mandatory hard gates for selling household refrigerators in Vietnam. Chinese exporters must obtain a recognised-laboratory test report, register the label with MOIT, and affix the Vietnamese star-rating label; the China Energy Label does not satisfy Vietnamese labelling obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] MOIT能效标签注册及越南能效标签展示是在越南销售家用电冰箱的强制性门槛。中国出口商须取得认可实验室检测报告、向MOIT注册标签并附贴越南星级标签；中国能效标识不满足越南标识义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] MOIT能效標籤登記及越南能效標籤展示是在越南銷售家用電冰箱的強制性門檻。中國出口商須取得認可實驗室檢測報告、向MOIT登記標籤並附貼越南星級標籤；中國能效標識不滿足越南標識義務。
